name: Special Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces waterchestnuts, canned, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green beans; trim the ends and remove any strings.
2. Combine the beans and water in a Dutch oven.
3. Bring to a boil, then cover and reduce heat. Simmer for 6-8 minutes or until crisp-tender.
4. Drain the beans.
5. Plunge the beans into ice water to stop the cooking process. Allow them to cool completely.
6. Drain the beans again and set aside.
7. In another Dutch oven, sauté the mushrooms with the remaining ingredients over medium heat.
8. Stir in the cooled green beans and cook until they are thoroughly heated.
9. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese before serving.
Yield: 8-10 servings.
